title: pelargonium × adscendens
intro: Pelargonium × adscendens, also known as the mountain rose geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family that is native to South Africa. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × adscendens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
